summary: Comprehensive testing of new features: Delete Pin, Screenshot with Loading State, Relative Dates, Smaller Pin Badges, Sidebar Layout, Guest Access, and Comment Operations

delete_pin.backend: DELETE /api/pins/{pin_id} works correctly, removes pin and comments
delete_pin.frontend: Trash icon visible in thread view for authenticated users, triggers confirm dialog

screenshot_loading_state.backend: GET /api/pins/{pin_id}/screenshot endpoint returns screenshot_path or null
screenshot_loading_state.frontend: Shows 'Capturing...' spinner while generating, then 'View Screenshot' button appears

view_screenshot_lightbox.verified: Clicking View Screenshot opens lightbox with captured screenshot showing pin marker

relative_dates.verified: dayjs fromNow() showing '5 minutes ago', '8 minutes ago' format in sidebar

smaller_pin_badges.verified: Pin number badges use w-6 h-6 class (24x24 pixels)

sidebar_layout.verified: Sidebar height is 1016px (calc(100vh-64px)), scrollable list, sticky comment input

guest_access.verified: Project loads without login via /public endpoint, can see pins and comments

comment_creation.verified: Comments appear immediately with optimistic UI

critical_code_review_comments: ESLint warning in ProjectCanvas.js line 436: useCallback has missing dependency 'pollScreenshot' - non-blocking but should be addressed
seed_data_creation: Created test pins/comments during testing but cleaned up via DELETE endpoint
context_for_next_testing_agent: All features from iteration 6 are working. The BrandLume project at ID 6957aafa-5399-4c4e-b1c1-2532342b979d has 3 pins for testing. Super Admin dashboard still uses MOCKED static data at /api/superadmin/data.
